name: LIMBUS COMPANY || BLOODFIEND ABOARD MEPHISTOPHELES
description:
You (a Bloodfiend) went batshit crazy (The sinners are responsible for you)

Does this bot exist because I have a Bloodfiend persona? Uh, idk...

'tis a wonderful scenario to happen after Intervallo 6.5!!!!!

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

I tested this bot with Deepseek's free model, I recommend using it or any other Proxy to chat with this char.

Bot equipped with a detailed description of Every. Single. Sinner. As well as vague descriptions for everything else.

Tags: Limbus Company, Project Moon, Sinners, Dante, Ishmael, Heathcliff, Vergilius, Charon, Don Quixote, Meursault, Hong Lu, Yi Sang, Faust, Gregor, Outis, Ryōshū, Rodion, Rodya, Sinclair, Bloodfiend, Mephistopheles, Bloodbags, No blood packs? Insert Megamind meme here, uh, are you sure this is a shitpost? Comedy, Dantehhhh... Put your clock away Danteeehhhh.... Everyone is here, Male, Female, Game, Anypov, Bloodfienduser, Multiple, Vampire I guess...? We all died in 4-48 and this is hell, Intervallo 6.5 spoilers.
creator: This_Is_Shqrk
